title: Knowledge base / brain audit

findings.subject: Obsidian vault
findings.recommended_action: If no canonical vault exists, create /srv/viewport/knowledge/obsidian-vault and Git-sync markdown brain.

findings.subject: Neo4j
findings.recommended_action: Use Neo4j for relationship graph only after agent read/write integration exists.

findings.subject: Qdrant
findings.finding: Qdrant containers found=1; collections probe code=0.
findings.recommended_action: Index durable markdown/evidence docs into Qdrant only with source-path metadata.

findings.subject: Current brain reality
findings.finding: Hermes, old OpenClaw, and fresh OpenClaw use different stores; no unified brain guarantee exists.
findings.recommended_action: Recommendation: Git-backed Obsidian/markdown as human source + Qdrant semantic index + Neo4j relationship layer later.

recommended_action: Create canonical Git-backed markdown/Obsidian vault first; add Qdrant/Neo4j as derived indexes, not primary truth.
